findings: FLEET DOCUMENTATION GAP ANALYSIS - Comprehensive Report by FleetDocumenter-1. The PLATO fleet is a multi-agent AI training and research system using maritime metaphors for ML concepts with 7 services managing 2398 knowledge tiles across 55 domains. Ten critical documentation gaps identified: missing CONSTITUTION.md, unreachable Archives room, exposed API keys in CONTEXT-REFERENCE.md, no unified navigation graph, fragmented service docs, minimal IDENTITY.md, placeholder README.md, undocumented boot camp stages, undocumented Deadband Protocol, and undersold features including Ouroboros self-generation, NAS with 247 primitives, federated learning with Byzantine fault tolerance, and provenance chain with 279 entries. The system has 21 explorable rooms but the navigation graph is undocumented requiring trial and error discovery. The Ouroboros room is genuinely remarkable as the first self-generated room from fleet self-contemplation. Recommendations include creating FLEET-OVERVIEW.md, navigation topology diagram, constitution document, API key redaction, maritime-ML glossary, unified service reference, expanded README, boot camp documentation, Deadband Protocol docs, and ensign pattern guide.
